summary: Iteration 74 Testing Complete - Supplier Ledger, Bank Accounts, POS Expense Improvements, Online Sales. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified via UI testing.
critical_code_review_comments: Supplier list endpoint correctly aggregates total_purchases from expenses collection
Supplier ledger endpoint returns proper structure with entries, summary, running balance
Ledger export endpoints correctly generate PDF and Excel files using reportlab and openpyxl
Supplier model supports bank_accounts as List[dict] with proper validation
Dashboard stats correctly calculates online_sales from payment_details and sale_type
POS expense tab properly distinguishes General Business Expenses from Supplier Purchases
Bank accounts form correctly enforces max 3 accounts with Add Bank button hiding at limit
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing suppliers data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P4 features fully functional. Suppliers page displays total_purchases on cards, View Ledger opens dialog with date filtering and PDF/Excel export. Add/Edit supplier forms support up to 3 bank accounts. POS page shows Online Sales stat from dashboard/stats API. Expense tab has clear General Business Expenses help text and only Cash/Bank payment options (no credit). Add Bills tab for supplier purchases with Credit/Cash/Bank options.

supplier_total_purchases_on_cards.details: Supplier cards display total_purchases field with amount (e.g., SAR 2,110.00)

supplier_list_api_total_purchases.details: Returns total_purchases for each supplier aggregated from expenses

supplier_ledger_endpoint.details: Returns supplier info, summary (purchases, payments, balances), entries with running balance

supplier_ledger_date_filter.details: Ledger accepts start_date and end_date query params for filtering

supplier_ledger_running_balance.details: Each ledger entry has balance field with running balance calculation

supplier_ledger_export_pdf.details: Returns PDF file with ledger data

supplier_ledger_export_excel.details: Returns Excel file with ledger data

supplier_bank_accounts_create.details: Create supplier with bank_accounts array works correctly

supplier_bank_accounts_max_3.details: Form enforces max 3 bank accounts, shows (x/3) counter

supplier_bank_accounts_fields.details: Bank account form has bank_name, account_number, iban, swift_code fields

dashboard_stats_online_sales.details: Returns online_sales field with correct value

pos_online_sales_display.details: POS page displays Online Sales stat card with value from API

pos_expense_tab_help_text.details: Shows 'General Business Expenses' with text distinguishing from supplier purchases

pos_expense_payment_modes.details: Expense tab only shows 'Paid by Cash' and 'Paid by Bank' options (no credit)

pos_add_bills_tab.details: Add Bills tab shows Credit/Cash/Bank payment options for supplier purchases

view_ledger_button.details: View Ledger button on supplier cards opens ledger dialog

ledger_dialog_ui.details: Ledger dialog shows date filters, export buttons (PDF/Excel), balance, summary cards, entries table
